That taken everything from us.’ I said to her: ‘How much is owing?’ She is how you dealt with me, and I have extended my mercy towards said: ‘Five pounds of gold.’ <=360 pieces, or 1638 grams of gold> you." 1 took out the gold and gave it to her, saying: ‘For fear of the judgement of God, I have not touched you. Go, redeem your husband with this gold, and pray for me.”
